history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows two people posing together at close range while riding inside a vehicle, with large Indonesian text overlaid on the screen.

Main Subject:
Two people are in the foreground, seated or standing close to each other and looking toward the camera. One person on the left has short dark hair and wears a light green hoodie with a small dark graphic on the chest, facing forward with a neutral expression. The person on the right has medium-length dark hair and wears a red top with a white collar area visible; they have a neutral expression and look directly at the camera while their right arm is raised behind the other person’s head toward the upper area of the vehicle.

Setting:
The scene appears to be indoors inside a modern enclosed space with metal or reflective panels. Behind them, a vertical divider or pole is visible, and above their heads there is a window or glass area with several rectangular posters or signs attached to the wall. The lighting is warm and even, suggesting artificial indoor lighting.

Visual Details:
The background is dominated by metallic and reflective surfaces in gray tones. The person on the right’s raised hand is visible near the top center, with fingers spread, appearing to rest against or hold near the overhead area. The overlaid text is large, bold, white with black outlines and colored shadowing: “DILARANG” appears in the upper left and “MELARANG” appears near the bottom center. The camera angle is straight-on to slightly elevated, with the subjects centered and occupying most of the frame.

Visible Text:
DILARANG
MELARANG

Practical Summary:
Two people are shown posing inside a vehicle or enclosed space, with one person’s arm raised behind the other’s head. Large Indonesian words are overlaid on the image: “DILARANG” and “MELARANG.”
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

DILARANG  
MELARANG

# Structured Version

- DILARANG  
- MELARANG

# Notes

- No unclear text detected.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
